description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed woman. wac has elegantly combined classic techniques and innovative designs so you can carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 17 cm x 8.5 cmHas one main compartment with a press buttoned closure and a zipped compartmentHas a press buttoned closure with six card slots and a see-through id card holderTwo slip pockets on either sideOne slip pocket at the back and branding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
